title: The Letter in the Drawer
content: While organizing old furniture, Hannah discovered a small letter hidden inside a drawer. It was written by her grandfather many years earlier for her grandmother. The words were full of love, gratitude, and hope for their future together. Hannah smiled as she carefully folded the letter again. Inspired by their story, she decided to write her own letter to Jacob. She realized that handwritten words could still carry feelings that no text message could ever replace.
